The pre-challenge preparation checklist requires the morning-of antihistamine washout band (no diphenhydramine or loratadine within the seventy-two-hour washout window), the asthma-medication clearance review (no albuterol within the four-hour pre-dose window), the routine baseline-vitals check, and the pre-dose lab-side draw for the baseline eosinophil count plus the tryptase reference value on the same-morning clinic phlebotomy queue. surprise_log.observation: E-Trade brokerage portal cutoff reminder on the prior-employer corporate-equity stock-option grant package: the non-qualified stock-option NSO post-termination ninety-day exercise window for the unexercised tranche of the original four-year grant closes at five p.m. local time today on the broker-portal election surface, ninety calendar days after the employment-termination date on the cap-table-side employment record. The exercise-election surface routes the cashless-exercise path through the broker's same-day-settlement window where the broker fronts the exercise-cost cash to the cap-table issuer and immediately sells a same-day matched lot of the just-issued shares on the public-market to recover the exercise-cost plus the payroll-side withholding through the broker-side settlement bridge, leaving the household with the residual net-share count after the bargain-element ordinary-income withholding tax-bracket applied at the strike-price vs fair-market value spread on the broker-statement reporting line. The alternative same-day-sale all-cash exercise path settles the full bargain-element ordinary-income on the broker-cash account through the broker-side tax-withholding deposit step. The missed-exercise-window outcome forfeits the unexercised tranche back into the option-pool reserve under the standard plan-document language with no extension or grace-period mechanism on the cap-table-issuer side, and the AMT alternative-minimum-tax preference-item flagging on the bargain-element exercise on Form 6251 sits on the tax-planning side for the next-cycle filing through the household-CPA accountant Trent Aguilar. The brokerage-portal multi-factor reauthentication step plus the exercise-share-count election plus the payroll-side withholding-bracket election plus the broker-tax-lot-method election need to land before the five-p.m. cutoff.

surprise_log.observation: An on-call platform-engineering rotation paged out a PagerDuty SEV-one ticket: the DNSSEC KSK key-signing-key rollover scheduled across the public-DNS authoritative-zone fleet started the parent-zone DS-record transition window on the registry-side TLD authoritative-nameserver side with the chain-of-trust validation breaking at the resolver-side cache mid-rollover, surfacing SERVFAIL resolver responses across the global-edge-POP fleet covering the public-internet customer-facing surface roughly eight minutes ago and climbing the impact-band through the rolling-window sampling cadence. The dual-signing-zone overlap requirement during the KSK rollover holds both the prior and the new key-signing-key in the zone-signing keyset through the parent-zone DS-record propagation TTL window, but the publishing-side automation rotated past the dual-signing overlap onto the new-only KSK before the parent-zone DS-record propagation completed on the resolver-side cache, leaving the chain-of-trust break at the resolver-side validation step on the cached parent-zone DS-record returning the prior-only KSK reference. The rollback path runs through the prior-KSK promotion window with the dual-signing-zone re-publish step and the parent-zone DS-record rollback request to the registry-side TLD operator with the manual-coordination ticket through the registry support-channel surface. The customer-facing exposure surfaces the storefront-DNS resolution failure-rate excursion past the SLO-bound threshold on the five-minute-rolling impact window, the partner-API endpoint resolution miss rate climbing past the operational threshold, and the CDN-edge-fetch lookup-side failure rate spike on the upstream-DNS resolution path. The seventy-five-minute runbook escalation crossed with the network-edge staff engineer joined onto the incident-bridge call, the security-infrastructure on-call cross-paged for the chain-of-trust validation lockdown, and the registry-coordination escalation manager on the manual-coordination ticket side.

surprise_log.prediction: DNSSEC KSK rollover failure triggers rollback path with potential impact across public-facing services.
